title: PE23 5DD, R. H-J. (FARMS) LIMITED: environmental permit issued – EPR/JP3628LG/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: R. H-J. (FARMS) LIMITED   Installation name: Grange Farm   Permit number: EPR/JP3628LG/A001   "
